'''ây-dh-th''' ('''kayadhath''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unbag|unbag]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-dh-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unbag|unbag]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ây-dh-th
|-
! Lemma
| kayadhath
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyadhath|thiyadhath]] || [[word:jiyadhath|jiyadhath]] || [[word:shiyadhath|shiyadhath]] || [[word:kiyadhath|kiyadhath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuyadhath|thuthuyadhath]] || [[word:jujuyadhath|jujuyadhath]] || [[word:shushuyadhath|shushuyadhath]] || [[word:kukuyadhath|kukuyadhath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuyadhath|thuyadhath]] || [[word:juyadhath|juyadhath]] || [[word:shuyadhath|shuyadhath]] || [[word:kuyadhath|kuyadhath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuyadhath|thuyadhath]] || [[word:juyadhath|juyadhath]] || [[word:shuyadhath|shuyadhath]] || [[word:kuyadhath|kuyadhath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theyadhath|theyadhath]] || [[word:jeyadhath|jeyadhath]] || [[word:sheyadhath|sheyadhath]] || [[word:keyadhath|keyadhath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoyadhath|thothoyadhath]] || [[word:jojoyadhath|jojoyadhath]] || [[word:shoshoyadhath|shoshoyadhath]] || [[word:kokoyadhath|kokoyadhath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoyadhath|thoyadhath]] || [[word:joyadhath|joyadhath]] || [[word:shoyadhath|shoyadhath]] || [[word:koyadhath|koyadhath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyadhath|thoyadhath]] || [[word:joyadhath|joyadhath]] || [[word:shoyadhath|shoyadhath]] || [[word:koyadhath|koyadhath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠyadhath|thĂŠyadhath]] || [[word:jĂŠyadhath|jĂŠyadhath]] || [[word:shĂŠyadhath|shĂŠyadhath]] || [[word:kĂŠyadhath|kĂŠyadhath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathayadhath|thathayadhath]] || [[word:jajayadhath|jajayadhath]] || [[word:shashayadhath|shashayadhath]] || [[word:kakayadhath|kakayadhath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayadhath|thayadhath]] || [[word:jayadhath|jayadhath]] || [[word:shayadhath|shayadhath]] || [[word:kayadhath|kayadhath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayadhath|thayadhath]] || [[word:jayadhath|jayadhath]] || [[word:shayadhath|shayadhath]] || [[word:kayadhath|kayadhath]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shayadhath|shayadhath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshayadhath|goshayadhath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishayadhath|gokishayadhath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shayadhathnĂŒ|shayadhathnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshayadhathnknĂŒ|goshayadhathnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishayadhathnĂŒ|gokishayadhathnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shayadhathshĂ«|shayadhathshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshayadhathnkshĂ«|goshayadhathnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishayadhathshĂ«|gokishayadhathshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayadhathro|shayadhathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayadhathnkro|goshayadhathnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayadhathro|gokishayadhathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shayadhathmu|shayadhathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayadhathnkmu|goshayadhathnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayadhathmu|gokishayadhathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shayadhathsher|shayadhathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshayadhathnksher|goshayadhathnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishayadhathsher|gokishayadhathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shayadhathng|shayadhathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshayadhathnkng|goshayadhathnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishayadhathng|gokishayadhathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shayadhathya|shayadhathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshayadhathnkya|goshayadhathnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishayadhathya|gokishayadhathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shayadhathyam|shayadhathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshayadhathnkyam|goshayadhathnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishayadhathyam|gokishayadhathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayadhathnĂŒshĂ«|shayadhathnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayadhathnknĂŒshĂ«|goshayadhathnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayadhathnĂŒshĂ«|gokishayadhathnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayadhathnĂŒro|shayadhathnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayadhathnknĂŒro|goshayadhathnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayadhathnĂŒro|gokishayadhathnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayadhathnĂŒmu|shayadhathnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayadhathnknĂŒmu|goshayadhathnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayadhathnĂŒmu|gokishayadhathnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayadhathshĂ«nĂŒ|shayadhathshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayadhathnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshayadhathnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayadhathshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishayadhathshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayadhathshĂ«ro|shayadhathshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayadhathnkshĂ«ro|goshayadhathnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayadhathshĂ«ro|gokishayadhathshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayadhathshĂ«mu|shayadhathshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayadhathnkshĂ«mu|goshayadhathnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayadhathshĂ«mu|gokishayadhathshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayadhathronĂŒ|shayadhathronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayadhathnkronĂŒ|goshayadhathnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayadhathronĂŒ|gokishayadhathronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayadhathroshĂ«|shayadhathroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayadhathnkroshĂ«|goshayadhathnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayadhathroshĂ«|gokishayadhathroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayadhathromu|shayadhathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayadhathnkromu|goshayadhathnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayadhathromu|gokishayadhathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayadhathmunĂŒ|shayadhathmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayadhathnkmunĂŒ|goshayadhathnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayadhathmunĂŒ|gokishayadhathmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayadhathmushĂ«|shayadhathmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayadhathnkmushĂ«|goshayadhathnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayadhathmushĂ«|gokishayadhathmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayadhathmuro|shayadhathmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayadhathnkmuro|goshayadhathnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayadhathmuro|gokishayadhathmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|806ef69}}
